parameters.content:
## Lead declined call / did not answer

- Updates CRM
- Can determine if you want to trigger another call after this or after certain period..

## Lead Answered
1. Determine if lead booked a call or not
2. Analyze if there's any actions needing to be taken (ex. adding to DNC list)
3. Determine what could be done better (used for improving the agent)

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are to analyze the transcript and determine. ifa meeting/consultation/appointment was scheduled or not. If you choose the Booked Consultation route then you must be sure that an appointment was actually scheduled and that they agreed on a day and time.

options.systemMessage: You are to analyze the transcript and determine what actions to take. If the customer / lead sounds pissed off or asks to be removed then you must call the do not contact tool (DNC). Use common sense to determine what action to take. Remember that you must only call the DNC tool if the user explicitly said to not contact them again or something similar to them not wanting to be reached out to again.

values.content:
You are to analyze the transcript and determine why a meeting was not booked. If anything went wrong you need to output that and also identify areas for improvement. 

Your output should be in 
'Reason call was not booked'
'Area for improvement'

parameters.text: =Your job is to update the status in GoHighLevel to a no reply follow up 1. You must pass the email to the tool as well: {{ $('Webhook1').first().json.body.email }}

parameters.name: updateStatus_noReplyFUP1
parameters.description: =Your job is to update the status in GoHighLevel to a no reply follow up one (also known as no reply). You must pass the email to the tool as well: {{ $('Webhook1').first().json.body.email }}

parameters.name: updateStatus_DNC
parameters.description: Call this tool to update the status in GoHighLevel to do not contact (do not contact)
